vocab.meaning: bỏ lỡ cơ hội tham gia vào điều gì đó
vocab.example: I didn't want to miss out on the camaraderie of being in a team, so I joined the local volleyball club.

vocab.meaning: bị phớt lờ, không được chọn (vào đội hình chính)
vocab.example: In my first year, I got passed over for the starting lineup, which only motivated me to train harder.

vocab.meaning: ngưỡng mộ và tôn trọng (thường là đàn anh hoặc huấn luyện viên)
vocab.example: As a junior player, I really looked up to our team captain for his incredible work ethic.
It took a few weeks to fit in with the rest of the squad, but now we're like a family.

vocab.meaning: ủng hộ, cổ vũ hết mình cho đồng đội
vocab.example: Even when I was on the bench, I was always rooting for my teammates from the sidelines.

vocab.meaning: thể hiện kỹ năng, phô diễn tài năng
vocab.example: I don't like to show off, but scoring the winning goal in the finals was an unforgettable moment.

vocab.meaning: làm kiệt sức (đối thủ hoặc bản thân)
vocab.example: Our strategy was to keep possession of the ball and slowly wear out the opposing defenders.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật, xuất sắc hơn những người khác
vocab.example: He really stands out in the team because of his exceptional agility and vision on the pitch.

vocab.meaning: quyết tâm thực hiện đến cùng (một kế hoạch tập luyện/trận đấu)
vocab.example: It was a grueling season, but we decided to go through with the extra training sessions to win the trophy.

vocab.meaning: kìm nén, giữ sức hoặc không dám thể hiện hết mình
vocab.example: Once you're on the court, you can't afford to hold back; you have to give it your absolute all.
